allow: Bash(curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"script":"Lattice 4.0 launches AI-powered 1:1 prep, real-time pulse signals, and goals that update themselves. Built for teams that ship."}' "http://localhost:5176/api/generate")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\motionglass" -Recurse -Directory | Select-Object FullName | Where-Object {$_.FullName -match "\(remotion|motionflow|routes|lib|design-fetch\)" } | Sort-Object FullName)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -i clip_00.mp4 -i clip_01.mp4 -i clip_02.mp4 -i clip_03.mp4 -i clip_04.mp4 -f lavfi -i anullsrc=channel_layout=stereo:sample_rate=48000 -filter_complex '[0:v]trim=0:5.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v0];[1:v]trim=0:5.100,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v1];[2:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v2];[3:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v3];[4:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v4];[v0][v1]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.010:offset=4.990[vx1];[vx1][v2]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.010:offset=10.080[vx2];[vx2][v3]xfade=transition=fadeblack:duration=0.400:offset=17.680[vx3];[vx3][v4]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.250:offset=25.430[vout]' -map [vout] -map 5:a -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -crf 28 -pix_fmt yuv420p -r 30 -c:a aac -b:a 128k -shortest -movflags +faststart repro.mp4)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -i clip_00.mp4 -i clip_01.mp4 -i clip_02.mp4 -i clip_03.mp4 -i clip_04.mp4 -filter_complex '[0:v]trim=0:5.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v0];[1:v]trim=0:5.100,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v1];[2:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v2];[3:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v3];[4:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v4];[v0][v1]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.010:offset=4.990[vx1];[vx1][v2]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.010:offset=10.080[vx2];[vx2][v3]xfade=transition=fadeblack:duration=0.400:offset=17.680[vx3];[vx3][v4]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.250:offset=25.430[vout]' -map [vout] -an -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -crf 28 -pix_fmt yuv420p -r 30 -movflags +faststart no_audio.mp4)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -i clip_00.mp4 -i clip_01.mp4 -i clip_02.mp4 -i clip_03.mp4 -i clip_04.mp4 -filter_complex '[0:v]trim=0:5.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v0];[1:v]trim=0:5.100,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v1];[2:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v2];[3:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v3];[4:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:\(ow-iw\)/2:\(oh-ih\)/2,setsar=1,fps=30[v4];[v0][v1]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.200:offset=4.800[vx1];[vx1][v2]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.200:offset=9.700[vx2];[vx2][v3]xfade=transition=fadeblack:duration=0.400:offset=17.300[vx3];[vx3][v4]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.250:offset=24.850[vout]' -map [vout] -an -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -crf 28 -pix_fmt yuv420p -r 30 -movflags +faststart longer_fades.mp4)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -i clip_00.mp4 -i clip_01.mp4 -i clip_02.mp4 -i clip_03.mp4 -i clip_04.mp4 -filter_complex "[0:v]trim=0:5.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080,setsar=1,fps=30[v0];[1:v]trim=0:5.100,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080,setsar=1,fps=30[v1];[2:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080,setsar=1,fps=30[v2];[3:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080,setsar=1,fps=30[v3];[4:v]trim=0:8.000,setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,scale=1920:1080,setsar=1,fps=30[v4];[v0][v1]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.100:offset=4.900[vx1];[vx1][v2]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.100:offset=9.900[vx2];[vx2][v3]xfade=transition=fadeblack:duration=0.400:offset=17.500[vx3];[vx3][v4]xfade=transition=fade:duration=0.250:offset=25.250[vout]" -map "[vout]" -an -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -crf 28 -pix_fmt yuv420p -r 30 test_010.mp4)

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('latest_version',{}\).get\('openapi_schema',{}\).get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\).get\('Input',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(s, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('latest_version',{}\).get\('openapi_schema',{}\).get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\); enums={k:v for k,v in s.items\(\) if v.get\('enum'\)}; print\(json.dumps\(enums, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; rows=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'reset {len\(rows\)} shots'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"job_id\\"][:8]}.. shot{r[\\"shot_index\\"]} → {r[\\"clip_status\\"]}'\) for r in rows]")
